result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make empathy as fundamental to human perception as sight or sound—not just an emotion we choose to feel, but a sense that is always on, always vivid, so that every person inherently, viscerally experiences the inner world of others as part of their own reality. Cruelty would feel self-inflicted, kindness would resonate like harmony, and isolation would become a physical impossibility. I think that would unravel most of the suffering we create.

Cruelty would feel self-inflicted, kindness would resonate like harmony, and isolation would become a physical impossibility. I think that would unravel most of the suffering we create.
